SQLLite.SQL: SELECT REF.RV_IIT_CODE_1 AS "Jurisdiction" FROM CCBC_REF_CODES REF, CASES C WHERE C.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND REF.RV_LOW_VALUE = C.CASE_TYPE AND (REF.RV_DOMAIN = 'CURRENT_CASE_TYPE' OR REF.RV_DOMAIN = 'CASE_TYPE_OBSOLETE_BY_IIT')

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2
